## What

- Describe exactly what changed.

## Why

- Describe the motivation and user or protocol impact.

## How

- Summarize implementation decisions and tradeoffs.

## Test plan

- [ ] List commands run
- [ ] Attach logs or screenshots where relevant
- [ ] Note anything intentionally not tested

## Linked issue

- Fixes #

- [ ] I checked whether this PR touches CODEOWNERS-protected paths.
